calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar May-27-2004 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day for name change..
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: Marta Vallejo, CSR: Yvonne Lee

Off Calendar, duplicate.

AMENDED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar May-27-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day for name change.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: Marta Vallejo, CSR: Yvonne Lee

Petitioner: Veronica Lobo and Ricardo Alvarado (the minor's father), present in pro per, were sworn and examined.
The Court grants the petition for change of name of the minor to: Enrique Aaron Alvarado-Lobo
Decree signed in open court
